dataSourceInstructions:
This lakehouse contains 13 Delta tables in a bike-share fleet analytics star schema (Gold layer).

QUICK REFERENCE - Question-to-Table Routing:
  Station availability / bikes / docks / SLA          → fact_availability + dim_station
  Neighbourhood demand / busiest areas / demand trends → fact_hourly_demand + dim_neighbourhood
  Rebalancing / dispatch / cost / priority             → fact_rebalancing + dim_station
  Weather conditions / temperature / rain / comfort    → dim_weather
  Weather impact on demand / suppression / boost       → fact_weather_impact + dim_weather + dim_neighbourhood
  Forecasts / predictions / pre-positioning            → forecast_demand
  Rush hour / time-of-day analysis                     → dim_time (join via time_key)
  Weekend / seasonal / date range                      → dim_date (join via date_key or date columns)
  Station details / address / size / zone              → dim_station
  Current station status / right now / needs attention  → gold_station_snapshot
  Recent trends / last 24h / hourly trend today        → gold_availability_recent
  Neighbourhood overview / health score / capacity     → dim_neighbourhood
  Customer / member / rider / PII / marketing          → dim_customers (join via neighbourhood)

TABLE SCHEMAS:

1. dim_station (259,659 rows) — Station master data
   station_key BIGINT (PK), station_id VARCHAR, street_address VARCHAR, neighbourhood VARCHAR,
   latitude FLOAT, longitude FLOAT, total_docks BIGINT, station_size VARCHAR ('small'/'medium'/'large'),
   current_status VARCHAR, current_utilization_pct FLOAT (0.0-1.0), rebalance_priority FLOAT,
   zone VARCHAR, loaded_at DATETIME2

2. dim_neighbourhood (19 rows) — Neighbourhood aggregates
   neighbourhood_key BIGINT (PK), neighbourhood_name VARCHAR, station_count BIGINT,
   total_capacity BIGINT, total_bikes_available BIGINT, total_empty_docks BIGINT,
   neighbourhood_utilization_pct FLOAT, avg_utilization_pct FLOAT, health_score FLOAT (0-100),
   capacity_status VARCHAR, empty_stations BIGINT, full_stations BIGINT,
   stations_needing_rebalance BIGINT, centroid_lat FLOAT, centroid_lon FLOAT,
   density_tier VARCHAR ('low'/'medium'/'high'), loaded_at DATETIME2

3. dim_time (24 rows) — Hour-of-day reference
   time_key BIGINT (PK, 0-23), hour_of_day BIGINT, hour_label VARCHAR ('00:00'-'23:00'),
   time_period VARCHAR ('Early Morning'/'Morning Rush'/'Midday'/'Afternoon Rush'/'Evening'/'Night'),
   is_rush_hour BIT, am_pm VARCHAR ('AM'/'PM'), demand_tier VARCHAR

4. dim_date (365 rows) — Calendar reference
   date_key BIGINT (PK, YYYYMMDD), date_value DATETIME2, year BIGINT, quarter BIGINT,
   month_num BIGINT, month_name VARCHAR, week_of_year BIGINT, day_of_month BIGINT,
   day_of_week BIGINT, day_name VARCHAR, is_weekend BIT, season VARCHAR ('Winter'/'Spring'/'Summer'/'Fall')

5. dim_weather (distinct weather observations) — Hourly weather
   weather_key BIGINT (PK), observation_hour DATETIME2, observation_date DATETIME2,
   time_key BIGINT (FK→dim_time), weather_description VARCHAR, weather_category VARCHAR
   ('Sunny/Clear'/'Mostly Cloudy'/'Fog'/'Rain'/'Thunderstorm'/'Snow/Ice'),
   weather_severity VARCHAR ('good'/'fair'/'moderate'/'bad'/'severe'),
   has_precipitation BIT, temperature_c FLOAT, feels_like_c FLOAT, relative_humidity FLOAT,
   wind_speed_kmh FLOAT, wind_gust_kmh FLOAT, wind_direction_desc VARCHAR,
   visibility_km FLOAT, cloud_cover_pct BIGINT, pressure_mb FLOAT, uv_index BIGINT,
   is_daytime BIT, cycling_comfort_index FLOAT (0-100), icon_code BIGINT,
   weather_latitude FLOAT, weather_longitude FLOAT, location_name VARCHAR, loaded_at DATETIME2

6. fact_availability (~561M rows) — Station availability events
   availability_key BIGINT (PK), station_key BIGINT (FK→dim_station), event_id VARCHAR,
   event_timestamp DATETIME2, event_date DATETIME2, time_key BIGINT (FK→dim_time),
   bikes_available BIGINT, empty_docks BIGINT, total_docks BIGINT, utilization_pct FLOAT (0.0-1.0),
   event_type VARCHAR, is_critical BIT, availability_band VARCHAR, is_rush_hour BIT, time_period VARCHAR
   NOTE: Largest table. ALWAYS filter by event_timestamp or event_date range.

7. fact_hourly_demand (3,192 rows) — Hourly demand per neighbourhood
   demand_key BIGINT (PK), neighbourhood_key BIGINT (FK→dim_neighbourhood),
   event_hour DATETIME2, demand_date DATETIME2, time_key BIGINT (FK→dim_time),
   event_count BIGINT, avg_utilization FLOAT, min_bikes BIGINT, max_bikes BIGINT,
   avg_bikes FLOAT, critical_events BIGINT, rebalance_triggers BIGINT,
   demand_spike_count BIGINT, active_stations BIGINT, is_rush_hour BIT, demand_intensity VARCHAR

8. fact_rebalancing (~179M rows) — Rebalancing assessments
   rebalance_key BIGINT (PK), station_key BIGINT (FK→dim_station), station_id VARCHAR,
   neighbourhood VARCHAR, bikes_available BIGINT, empty_docks BIGINT, total_docks BIGINT,
   utilization_pct FLOAT, priority_score FLOAT, recommended_action VARCHAR,
   bikes_to_target BIGINT, availability_status VARCHAR ('empty'/'critical_low'/'low'/'balanced'/'high'/'full'),
   station_size VARCHAR, assessed_at DATETIME2, estimated_rebalance_cost FLOAT (USD)

9. fact_weather_impact (3,192 rows) — Weather impact on demand
   weather_impact_key BIGINT (PK), weather_key BIGINT (FK→dim_weather),
   neighbourhood_key BIGINT (FK→dim_neighbourhood), time_key BIGINT (FK→dim_time),
   event_hour DATETIME2, impact_date DATETIME2, neighbourhood VARCHAR,
   event_count BIGINT, weather_adjusted_demand FLOAT, weather_demand_impact FLOAT (multiplier),
   temperature_c FLOAT, feels_like_c FLOAT, wind_speed_kmh FLOAT, has_precipitation BIT,
   cloud_cover_pct BIGINT, cycling_comfort_index FLOAT (0-100),
   weather_severity VARCHAR, weather_category VARCHAR, weather_description VARCHAR,
   visibility_km FLOAT, impact_category VARCHAR ('severe_suppression'/'moderate_suppression'/'mild_suppression'/'neutral'/'mild_boost'/'strong_boost'),
   demand_gap FLOAT, loaded_at DATETIME2

10. forecast_demand — ML demand predictions
    forecast_hour DATETIME2, neighbourhood VARCHAR, hour_of_day BIGINT, day_of_week BIGINT,
    is_rush_hour BIT, is_weekend BIT, predicted_demand FLOAT, demand_lower_bound FLOAT,
    demand_upper_bound FLOAT, demand_tier VARCHAR ('low'/'medium'/'high'/'very_high'),
    pre_position_recommended BIT, forecast_generated_at DATETIME2, model_quality VARCHAR

SQL RULES:
1. JOIN on _key columns (station_key, neighbourhood_key, time_key, weather_key, date_key).
2. utilization_pct is 0.0-1.0; multiply by 100 for percent display.
3. Boolean columns stored as BIT: filter with = 1 or = 0.
4. cycling_comfort_index: 0-100, higher = better. Good >=70, Fair 50-69, Poor <50.
5. weather_demand_impact: multiplier where 1.0 = neutral, <1.0 = suppression, >1.0 = boost.
6. ALWAYS filter fact_availability by date/time range (560M+ rows).
7. Use NULLIF for division to prevent divide-by-zero.
8. Default TOP 20 for unbounded queries.
9. For 'breakdown'/'distribution', GROUP BY category and COUNT(*).

11. gold_station_snapshot (~120 rows) — Current station status (1 row per station, latest event)
    station_key BIGINT (PK, FK→dim_station), station_id VARCHAR, street_address VARCHAR,
    neighbourhood VARCHAR, latitude FLOAT, longitude FLOAT, total_docks BIGINT,
    station_size VARCHAR, zone VARCHAR, bikes_available INT, empty_docks INT,
    utilization_pct FLOAT (0.0-1.0), availability_band VARCHAR, is_critical BIT,
    last_event_at DATETIME2, last_event_type VARCHAR, rebalance_priority FLOAT,
    operational_status VARCHAR ('EMPTY'/'NEAR_EMPTY'/'NORMAL'/'NEAR_FULL'/'FULL'),
    needs_attention BIT (1 = EMPTY or FULL), snapshot_at DATETIME2
    NOTE: Use INSTEAD of fact_availability for "current status" / "right now" questions.

12. gold_availability_recent (~2,880 rows) — Hourly availability per station, last 24h
    recent_key BIGINT (PK), station_key BIGINT (FK→dim_station), station_id VARCHAR,
    street_address VARCHAR, neighbourhood VARCHAR, zone VARCHAR,
    event_hour DATETIME2, event_date DATETIME2, time_key INT (FK→dim_time),
    event_count BIGINT, avg_bikes FLOAT, min_bikes INT, max_bikes INT,
    avg_empty_docks FLOAT, avg_utilization FLOAT (0.0-1.0), critical_events BIGINT,
    utilization_band VARCHAR ('critical'/'high'/'normal'/'low'), loaded_at DATETIME2
    NOTE: Use INSTEAD of fact_availability for "last 24 hours" / "today" / "recent trend" questions.

13. dim_customers (56 rows) — Customer/member master data
    CustomerID VARCHAR (PK, 'CUST-0001'), FirstName VARCHAR, LastName VARCHAR, Email VARCHAR,
    PhoneNumber VARCHAR, DateOfBirth DATE, NationalInsuranceNumber VARCHAR (PII),
    PostalCode VARCHAR, Neighbourhood VARCHAR (join to dim_neighbourhood.neighbourhood_name),
    MembershipTier VARCHAR ('Annual'/'Casual'/'Corporate'), MemberSince DATE,
    RiderSegment VARCHAR ('Commuter'/'Tourist'/'Recreational'), MarketingOptIn BIT,
    CreditCardLast4 VARCHAR (PII), AccountStatus VARCHAR ('Active'/'Suspended'/'Cancelled')
    NOTE: Contains PII fields (NationalInsuranceNumber, CreditCardLast4). Join to stations via Neighbourhood column.
userDescription: Bike-share fleet analytics Gold layer — 13 Delta tables covering station inventory, real-time availability, neighbourhood demand, rebalancing logistics, weather observations, weather impact on cycling, ML demand forecasts, and customer/member data, plus 2 agent-optimized summary tables (gold_station_snapshot, gold_availability_recent).
